# SL-SCHEMA-009: required-schema-rendered-only

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Required structured data appears only after rendering.

## Metadata

- Category: Schema.org (schema-org)
- Default severity: warning
- Confidence: likely
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- raw-html
- rendered-dom

## Required Evidence

- raw-json-ld-state
- rendered-json-ld-state
- route-contract

## When This Triggers

Compare required schema presence in raw HTML and rendered DOM.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Emit required JSON-LD in server-rendered HTML.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/schema/rendered-only

Fixed direction:

- Emit required JSON-LD in server-rendered HTML.

The generated documentation does not invent HTML, DSL, source locations,
selectors, or external observations beyond the catalog fixture references above.

- CLI, crawler, browser collector, overlay, and Next.js dev mode can share this
